item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Jokela: Thank you for your cooperation. A guard will be here to escort you back to your cell shortly.

If she is trying to convince the SCP that he is not a prisoner, then she should use a different word than cell.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I agree, while it was interesting it would be nice to have a bigger point in the greater picture.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
It's interesting, to say the least. The restrictiveness of the Foundation on humanoids seems to be the focus here, but even that is a bit loose. One thing I could definitely ask for here is more focus on a specific goal of the article. But I still enjoyed it, and I've seen a whole lot worse out there before.

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Seconding this. If the actual interest in the article is in the companion tale, it would be better to figure out how to incorporate that into the main article.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I'm honestly not sure how to fix the interest thing though. I've got a companion tale written up with the final twist for this thing, but I'm seeing how this goes before I post it.

The problem here is that it's a borderline entrant for the Log of Anomalous Items. There's not much the reader can be engaged with such a simple premise.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Thanks for the feedback.

Level 4 is an accidental holdover from when the final twist was in the skip and not the companion tale, I've bumped it back down to 3.

I'm honestly not sure how to fix the interest thing though. I've got a companion tale written up with the final twist for this thing, but I'm seeing how this goes before I post it.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
The anomaly fails to engage any form of interest. Even the immediate escalation fails to establish any sense of danger or threat due to how uninteresting the anomaly is.

Putting this at Level 4 isn't a very fitting choice for this. This should be at Level 2 or 3 at most.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I dig this! +1 but i do want to suggest one change in the dialogues; I don't think you need to outright state when someone interrupts someone, having the "—" symbol truncate an unfinished idea followed by someone else talking pretty much communicates an interruption to me. Unless that's standard for the site and I'm only noticing right now like a dummy.

I feel like I might be missing something, however, as I don't see why the true nature of the SCP needs to be hidden two pay-grades above the initial document? There's probably something. Either way, it doesn't bother me, I enjoyed this.

item.title: Author Post
item.content:encoded:
First skip/second article. Hope it turned out alright.

Thank you to everyone that critted:

IRC:
Dyslexion
Bell-Blinger
Jimmyjimjim
LtMarsh
DrAkimoto
Prior
Posioak (definitely misspelled - sorry!)
JakdragonX
Mistopheles
supersnail
S150wned
BlueJones
undeuxtrois
…and probably several others I forgot. Sorry!
Forum:
Zyn
